scope.summary: SEC-1 e2e coverage proves each persisted recovery/apply path re-classifies at apply time and refuses forged/stale authorization before DDL reaches the mock database seam.
out_of_scope: live Oracle execution; this is the driver-free integration proof for dispatcher/operator recovery seams
dirty files outside this scope that belonged to other active panes during evidence generation

entry_points.name: change-proposal apply
entry_points.trace: stored READ_ONLY verdict is ignored; live DDL reclassification returns OPERATING_LEVEL_TOO_LOW with zero DDL execute calls

entry_points.name: source-history revert apply
entry_points.trace: tampered stored verdict in the recovered proposal remains advisory only and live DDL is refused

entry_points.name: durable write-intent restart
entry_points.trace: pending intent reopens unresolved and is never auto-resolved or replayed

entry_points.name: session recycle/reconnect
entry_points.trace: recoverable pinned read quarantine reconnects the profile, lowers live state to READ_ONLY, and a pre-recycle DDL confirmation receives OPERATING_LEVEL_TOO_LOW before DDL execute

entry_points.name: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo fmt --all -- --check
entry_points.trace: Passed before evidence generation for source SHA 7d4314bf159caba2f52986216cfc93937364bcfe.

entry_points.name: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp --test sec1_reclassification_e2e -- --nocapture
entry_points.trace: Passed: 8 tests passed, 0 failed; covers change-proposal apply, failed apply retry, durable proposal restart, source-history revert, write-intent restart no-replay, profile-switch re-entry, passive elevation expiry, and A4e session recycle/reconnect.

entry_points.name: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo check -p oraclemcp-core
entry_points.trace: Passed scoped core check before close evidence.

entry_points.name: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo clippy -p oraclemcp --test sec1_reclassification_e2e -- -D warnings
entry_points.trace: Passed focused integration-test clippy with warnings denied.

limitations: Evidence is scoped to the driver-free integration suite and committed source SHA 7d4314bf159caba2f52986216cfc93937364bcfe.
The evidence scaffold reported dirty paths outside the E2 scope; they were excluded from this close proof.
